reaction_characterization.notes: Reaction-based timings include human response delay. Use these as bench-tuning targets until video-based pedal contact and release timings are captured.

notes.current_setup: The runtime now supports up to four PCA9685 boards sharing the Arduino's I2C bus in parallel as one 64-channel global space. The current bench setup uses 61 solenoids across four PCA9685 boards: channels 0 through 60 are wired, with the final board using only its lower 13 channels.
notes.wiring_assumption: Global channels 0 through 15 live on the first configured PCA9685 address, 16 through 31 on the second, 32 through 47 on the third, and 48 through 63 on the fourth.
notes.future_setup: As more solenoids are added, extend the note mapping or save a calibrated_mapping.json file. Songs can then be limited to the currently installed note range.
